author: Aadeeb S.
pros: We use Traek to track the traffic trends of our website & are quite happy with its performance so far. It is a simple to use tool that offers rich analytics for website monitoring and lead generation. Customer mapping is largely simplified with Traek now. Functional features galore at this analytical tool. Notification alerts and chatbot features are some of the amazing properties of Traek that helps us to get a real-time view of our website traffic and prospective business leads.
cons: Traek seldom disappoints its users. There is nothing to disregard in terms of functionality and feature set of Traek. However, the software runs slow at times that prolongs the entire process and also disrupts the user experience.

review_title: Traek - One of the Best Tools You Need For Lead Generation
description: i Love this new tool and i have used this now for my business, finding leads and generate sales is essential for online business visitors that traek have provided with my website.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the software interface, it's clean and i can read all data i needed to know about my visitors
cons: I like and love the product but i think they should provide training as this is essential to new user like me, although i figure this out because i have used and tested a lot of lead generation tools so im just very familiar to it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jacob H.
pros: The product has a good ability to show a point in time view of where you are. This helps with taking a proactive approach to mitigating risk.
cons: Seems like they are somewhat trying to boil the ocean. Need to make sure that they are covering the key value areas and doing them well prior to building out more feature areas.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best Platform to Keep Track of Tasks
description: I've been using Traek software for a little over a year now, and I absolutely love it! It's saved me so much time and hassle when it comes to managing my business finances. The customer support is also excellent - they're always quick to respond to any questions or issues I have. I highly recommend Traek software to any business owner looking for an easy and efficient way to manage their finances.
author: Akshay S.
pros: Traek software is simple to use and makes it easy to keep track of my tasks and projects, There are many things to like about Traek software. One of the things that I like most is the ability to quickly and easily create custom reports. This allows me to get the information that I need in a format that is easy for me to understand.
cons: There is not much that I did not like about Traek software. One thing that I found to be a bit of a hassle was inputting all of my inventory information.

review_title: Amazing product with additional features than other Website analytics tool
author: Hemant W.
pros: 1. Visitor Tracking 2. Adding companies to the watchlist 3. Real-time monitoring 4. Chat option with real-time visitors.
cons: 1) Should have fixed pricing model rather than pay as you go.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall I am happy with the product and the promised done to me while selecting it
author: Mihir C.
pros: Chatting, real-time, and watch are the best
cons: Data is comparatively less but it is okay

description: I am really glad I started using this product. Now I can see what happens on my website and also work on it. Leads are more and we are happy.

pros: Amazing insights and UX, Very good traffic analytics. Chatting feature is an add on.
cons: Can work on database, it is a bit less or now but they are promising and will upgrade

author: Vivek G.
pros: Traek is one of the essential lead generation tools in Notesally's tech stack. Traek helps us by enabling us to convert a casual visitor to our site into a lead. I love that I can initiate a chat with a visitor using Traek Realtime. Integrating Traek was a no-brainer and their commitment to data privacy is also commendable :)
cons: I would love to see a clear demarcation of ISP Name Vs. Visitor's organization in leads view
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
